intro_heading: Every gift makes the next show possible.
intro_body: Ticket sales and tuition cover much of what we do at Peninsula Youth Theatre — but not all of it. Scholarships, school touring, capital needs, and the equipment that lets us produce work on this scale all depend on donor support. Your gift directly funds the experiences our young performers will carry with them long after the final curtain.
matching_note: Many Bay Area employers match charitable gifts dollar-for-dollar. Apple, Google, Meta, Salesforce, Benevity, and others all run matching programs. Check with your HR team — your gift could go twice as far.
